config_str: n=5, L=1, Cascade topology; pre_hidden=50 + post_hidden=50; per-qubit ⟨Z⟩ readout + post-NN scalar
audit_reason: Δx = 2π/64 ≈ 0.098 ~ 1.2× the equilibrium front width √2·ε ≈ 0.085; >10× the 28×28 resolution that P3.7 used. Tests whether 'broadband failure' was sub-Nyquist aliasing vs a real regime property
